arts.sum: Three Lions looking for response after Greece defeat

arts.ttl: Finland vs England – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: England travel to Finland on Sunday as the Three Lions look to bounce back from a humbling home defeat to Greece. Lee Carsley’s side need maximum points in Helsinki to get their UEFA Nations League campaign back on track, following last week’s setback at Wembley. Carsley’s hopes of earning the England manager role on a […] The post Finland vs England – Match Preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Sunday's Nations League predictions including Finland vs. England
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Nations League fixtures, including Finland vs. England.

arts.ttl: Report: Lee Carsley does not want full-time England job
arts.sum: England interim manager Lee Carsley does not want the permanent Three Lions job, according to reports. But the plan is to give this job [England's senior side] for three camps the best I can do along with the rest of the staff and hopefully we can be in a good position.

arts.ttl: Conor Gallagher sends message to England boss Lee Carsley after Greece horror show
arts.sum: Lee Carsley employed an attacking England lineup against Greece, albeit without a striker, but saw the Three Lions look vulnerable in defence and now they must bounce back against Finland

arts.ttl: Carsley expects reaction from England in Finland
arts.sum: Interim manager Lee Carsley anticipates a reaction from his England side against Finland as he reverts to a more familiar formation, with captain Harry Kane set to return from injury.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley: Naive to think England can win titles without trying something new
arts.sum: The interim boss came in for fierce criticism in the wake of the defeat to Greece.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley sends Harry Kane desperate message as England boss drops Finland team hint
arts.sum: Harry Kane wasn't fully fit as England suffered a humiliating 2-1 loss to Greece at Wembley on Thursday but he's expected to start against Finland, now a must-win game

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley says England must try something different - but casts doubt on own future
arts.sum: Lee Carsley's hopes of becoming England's permanent manager took a dent on Thursday night, but he insists that he has no regrets over the tactical gamble which backfired at Wembley

arts.ttl: Tony Adams flags Lee Carsley England appointment concern over problem that cost Gareth Southgate
arts.sum: Former England captain Tony Adams believes interim boss Lee Carsley must be supported by major tournament coaching experience if he is to be successful and land the Three Lions job on a permanent basis
